$comment: Single source of truth for tested platforms and providers. Scripts read this to generate README and docs tables. QA/CI update this file; docs are derived.

platforms.name: macOS (Apple Silicon)
platforms.notes: Install Xcode Command Line Tools (`xcode-select --install`) and start the runtime before running the installer.

platforms.name: DGX Spark
platforms.notes: Use the standard installer and `nemoclaw onboard`.

platforms.name: Windows WSL2
platforms._prd_note: PRD tracks x86 and ARM (WOA) separately; treating as one entry until ARM is validated independently.
platforms.notes: Requires WSL2 with Docker Desktop backend.

platforms.name: DGX Station
platforms.notes: P1 per PRD. Setup path not yet validated.

platforms.name: RTX Spark
platforms.notes: P1 per PRD. Setup path not yet validated.

platforms.name: NVIDIA RTX
platforms.notes: P1 per PRD. Setup path not yet validated.

platforms.name: NVIDIA RTX Pro
platforms.notes: P1 per PRD. Setup path not yet validated.

providers.name: Other Anthropic-compatible endpoint
providers.notes: For Claude proxies and compatible gateways

providers.name: Local Ollama
providers.notes: Available when Ollama is installed or running on the host

providers.name: Local vLLM
providers.notes: Requires `NEMOCLAW_EXPERIMENTAL=1` and a server already running on `localhost:8000`
